headerDisplay:
Device setup is managed in Plugin Settings when available.
If Homebridge does not show the Plugin Settings cog, add extra purifiers in Additional Devices JSON below or edit the real devices array in the JSON Config tab. The nested visual device editor is intentionally disabled because Homebridge renders it incorrectly.

additionalDevicesJson.title: Additional Devices JSON
additionalDevicesJson.description: Optional fallback when Plugin Settings is unavailable. Paste a JSON array of extra or overriding device entries, for example: [{"name":"Bedroom","host":"192.168.1.101","protocol":"coap"}]. Entries with the same host or Air+ UUID override the hidden devices[] entry at runtime.
